metadata.description: Name prefix for all resources. Must be unique.
Primary location for all resources.
The current IP address of the machine running the deployment (for SQL Server firewall)
The UserId GUID for the current user (for RBAC assignments)
The login name (email) of the current user for SQL admin
Whether to deploy the Batch Account
Whether to deploy the container registry
Whether to deploy the Container App Environment
Whether to deploy AKS
Number of test databases to create per server (0 to skip database deployment)
Whether to use private endpoints for SQL Server connectivity instead of public network access
The messaging tier for Event Hub namespace
MessagingUnits for premium namespace
Prefix to prepend to resource names.  Should be 3-6 characters long.  Should not contain any special characters.  Should be unique across all deployments.
Name of the NSG to create. Default is <namePrefix>nsg
Name of the Batch NSG to create. Default is <namePrefix>Batchnsg
Name of the VNet to create. Default is <namePrefix>vnet
Name of the AKS subnet to create. Default is <namePrefix>akssubnet
Name of the container app subnet to create. Default is <namePrefix>containerappsubnet
Name of the ACI subnet to create. Default is <namePrefix>acisubnet
Name of the Batch subnet to create. Default is <namePrefix>batchsubnet
Name of the private endpoint subnet to create. Default is <namePrefix>privateendpointsubnet
Name of the location. Default is the resource group location
IP range for the VNet. Default is 10.180.0.0/19
IP range for the AKS subnet. Default is 10.180.0.0/22
IP range for the container app subnet. Default is 10.180.4.0/22
IP range for the ACI subnet. Default is 10.180.8.0/22
IP range for the Batch subnet. Default is 10.180.12.0/22
IP range for the private endpoint subnet. Default is 10.180.16.0/24
Prefix to prepend to account names
Number of test databases to create per server
Location for all resources.
Current machine IP address to allow access to the SQL Server.
Array of subnet resource ids to allow access to the SQL Server.
Object ID (GUID) of the Entra ID user or group to set as SQL admin
Login name (email or display name) of the Entra ID admin
Whether to use private endpoints instead of public network access
VNet ID for private DNS zone link (required when usePrivateEndpoint is true)
Private endpoint subnet ID (required when usePrivateEndpoint is true)
Prefix to prepend to resource names.  Should be 3-6 characters long.  Should not contain any special characters.  Should be unique across all deployments.
Name of the NSG to create. Default is <namePrefix>nsg
Name of the Batch NSG to create. Default is <namePrefix>Batchnsg
Name of the VNet to create. Default is <namePrefix>vnet
Name of the AKS subnet to create. Default is <namePrefix>akssubnet
Name of the container app subnet to create. Default is <namePrefix>containerappsubnet
Name of the ACI subnet to create. Default is <namePrefix>acisubnet
Name of the Batch subnet to create. Default is <namePrefix>batchsubnet
Name of the private endpoint subnet to create. Default is <namePrefix>privateendpointsubnet
Name of the location. Default is the resource group location
IP range for the VNet. Default is 10.180.0.0/19
IP range for the AKS subnet. Default is 10.180.0.0/22
IP range for the container app subnet. Default is 10.180.4.0/22
IP range for the ACI subnet. Default is 10.180.8.0/22
IP range for the Batch subnet. Default is 10.180.12.0/22
IP range for the private endpoint subnet. Default is 10.180.16.0/24
Name of Batch Account to Create
Name of Batch Account to Create. Default is <prefixName>batchacct
Name of user assigned mangaged identy to assign. Default is <prefixName>identity
Name of storage account to use with Batch Account. Default is <prefixName>storage
Location for all resources.
Name of the storage account
Location for the storage account
Current machine IP address to allow access to the storage account
Comma-separated list of subnet names to allow access to the storage account
VNet name for subnet references
Whether to use private endpoints instead of public network access
VNet ID for private DNS zone link (required when usePrivateEndpoint is true)
Private endpoint subnet ID (required when usePrivateEndpoint is true)
Name prefix for private endpoint resources
Name of the Log Analytics workspace
Location for the Log Analytics workspace
Name of the Event Hub namespace
Name of the Event Hub
The messaging tier for Event Hub namespace
Messaging units for premium namespace
Location for the Event Hub
Whether to use private endpoints instead of public network access
VNet ID for private DNS zone link (required when usePrivateEndpoint is true)
Private endpoint subnet ID (required when usePrivateEndpoint is true)
Name prefix for private endpoint resources
Name of the Service Bus namespace
Location for the Service Bus
Whether to use private endpoints instead of public network access
VNet ID for private DNS zone link (required when usePrivateEndpoint is true)
Private endpoint subnet ID (required when usePrivateEndpoint is true)
Name prefix for private endpoint resources
